title: Appendix #A-14 ORS Cheque Report Fields
body_text:
Appendix #A-14	ORS Cheque Report Fields
Column Name
Column Description
Format
A
Action taken on item
RI ГўВЂВ“ Return
RS ГўВЂВ“ Reinstate
RC
Reason Code
3-digit cheque return reason code
Date
Date item is charged to financial institution account at Central 1
Mmm dd yyyy, Example: Jan 05 2005
Cheq #
Cheque serial #
1ГўВЂВ“12 digits
Tran
Route and Transit Number
Example: 12340809
Acct
MICR account number
1ГўВЂВ“14 digits
Amount
Dollar amount of item
1ГўВЂВ“8 digit dollar amount + ГўВЂВњ.ГўВЂВќ + 2 digit cents
Trace #
Trace #
1ГўВЂВ“10 digits
RS Tran
Reinstated route and Transit Number
Example: 54320809
RS Acct
Reinstated MICR account number
1ГўВЂВ“14 digits
RS Cheq #
Reinstated cheque serial #
1ГўВЂВ“12 digits
User ID
Name of user that created item
1ГўВЂВ“8 characters
O/U
Online or Upload
O ГўВЂВ“ Indicates item was created online via ORS
U ГўВЂВ“ Indicates item was uploaded to ORS via RI file
